title: Mahagauri Chalisa
intro: Shri Mahagauri Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Mahagaur
description:
|| Shri Maha Gauri Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Man mandir mere aan baso, aarambh karoon gungaan,
Gauri Maa Mateshwari, do charanon ka dhyan.
Poojan vidhi na jaanti, par shraddha hai aapar,
Pranam mera swikariye, he Maa praan aadhar.

|| Chaupai ||
Namo namo he Gauri Mata,
Aap ho meri bhagya vidhata,
Sharanagat na kabhi gabharata,
Gauri Uma Shankari Mata.
Aapka priya hai aadar paata,
Jai ho Kartikey Ganesh ki Mata,
Mahadev Ganpati sang aao,
Mere sakal kalesh mitao.
Sarthak ho jaye jag mein jeena,
Satkarmon se kabhi hatu na,
Sakal manorath purna kijo,
Sukh suvidha vardaan mein dijo.
He Maa bhagya rekha jaga do,
Man bhavan suyog mila do,
Man ko bhaye vo var chahu,
Sasural paksh ka sneha mai payu.
Param aaradhya aap ho meri,
Phir kyun var mein itni deri,
Hamre kaaj sampurna kijiyo,
Thode mein barkat bhar dijiyo.
Apni daya banaye rakhna,
Bhakti bhav jagaye rakhna,
Gauri Mata ansan rehna,
Kabhi na khoyu man ka chaina.
Dev muni sab sheesh navate,
Sukh suvidha ko var mai paate,
Shraddha bhav jo le kar aaya,
Bin mange bhi sab kuch paya.
Har sankat se use ubara,
Aage badh ke diya sahara,
Jab bhi Maa aap sneha dikhlave,
Nirash man mein aas jagave.
Shiv bhi aapka kaha na tale,
Daya drishti hum pe dale,
Jo jan karta aapka dhyan,
Jag mein paye maan samman.
Sache man jo sumiran karti,
Uske suhag ki raksha karti,
Daya drishti jab Maa dale,
Bhav sagar se paar utare.
Jape jo Om Namah Shivay,
Shiv parivar ka sneha vo paye,
Jishpe aap daya dikhave,
Dusht aatma nahi satave.
Sata gun ki ho data aap,
Har ek man ki gyata aap,
Kato hamre sakal kalesh,
Nirog rahe parivar hamesha.
Dukh santap mita dena Maa,
Megh daya ke barsa dena Maa,
Jabahi aap mauj mein aaye,
Hat jaye Maa sab vipdayein.
Jishpe dayal ho Mata aap,
Uska badhta punya pratap,
Phal-phool mai dugdh chadhaun,
Shraddha bhav se aapko dhyau.
Avgun mere dhak dena Maa,
Mamta aanchal kar dena Maa,
Kathin nahi kuch aapko Mata,
Jag thukraya daya ko pata.
Bin pau na gun Maa tere,
Naam dham swaroop bahu tere,
Jitne aapke pavan dham,
Sab dhamo ko Maa pranam.
Aapki daya ka hai na paar,
Tabhi ko puje kul sansaar,
Nirmal man jo sharan mein aata,
Mukti ki vo yukti pata.
Santosh dhann se daaman bhar do,
Asambhav ko Maa sambhav kar do,
Aapki daya ke bhare,
Sukhi base mera parivar.
Apki mahima ati nirali,
Bhakto ke dukh harne wali,
Manokamna puran karti,
Man ki duvidha pal mein harti.
Chalisa jo bhi padhe-sunaya,
Suyogya var vardaan mein paye,
Asha purna kar dena Maa,
Sumangal sakhi var dena Maa.

|| Doha ||
Gauri Maa vinti karoon, aana aapke dwar,
Aisi Maa kripa kijiye, ho jaye uddhar.
Heem heem heem sharan mein, do charanon ka dhyan,
Aisi Maa kripa kijiye, paun maan samman.

|| Stuti ||
Ya Devi sarvabhuteshu, Maa Mahagauri rupena samsthita,
Namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namo namah.
meaning:
|| Shri Maha Gauri Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Man mandir mere aan baso, aarambh karoon gungaan,
(O Mother, come and dwell in my heart, I begin to praise you,)
Gauri Maa Mateshwari, do charanon ka dhyan.
(Mother Gauri, the Great Mother, I meditate on your feet.)
Poojan vidhi na jaanti, par shraddha hai aapar,
(I do not know the rituals of worship, but my devotion is boundless,)
Pranam mera swikariye, he Maa praan aadhar.
(Please accept my salutations, O Mother, the support of my life.)

|| Chaupai ||
Namo namo he Gauri Mata,
(Salutations to you, Mother Gauri,)
Aap ho meri bhagya vidhata,
(You are the architect of my destiny,)
Sharanagat na kabhi gabharata,
(Those who take refuge never fear,)
Gauri Uma Shankari Mata.
(Mother Gauri, Uma, Shankari.)
Aapka priya hai aadar paata,
(Your loved ones receive respect,)
Jai ho Kartikey Ganesh ki Mata,
(Victory to you, Mother of Kartikeya and Ganesha,)
Mahadev Ganpati sang aao,
(Come with Mahadev and Ganpati,)
Mere sakal kalesh mitao.
(And erase all my troubles.)
Sarthak ho jaye jag mein jeena,
(May my life in this world be meaningful,)
Satkarmon se kabhi hatu na,
(May I never stray from righteous deeds,)
Sakal manorath purna kijo,
(Fulfill all my desires,)
Sukh suvidha vardaan mein dijo.
(And grant me the boon of happiness and comfort.)
He Maa bhagya rekha jaga do,
(O Mother, awaken my fortune,)
Man bhavan suyog mila do,
(Bring me favorable opportunities,)
Man ko bhaye vo var chahu,
(I seek the blessing that my heart desires,)
Sasural paksh ka sneha mai payu.
(May I receive love from my in-laws.)
Param aaradhya aap ho meri,
(You are my supreme object of worship,)
Phir kyun var mein itni deri,
(Then why is there such a delay in the boon?)
Hamre kaaj sampurna kijiyo,
(Complete all my tasks,)
Thode mein barkat bhar dijiyo.
(And fill my little with abundance.)
Apni daya banaye rakhna,
(Keep your grace upon me,)
Bhakti bhav jagaye rakhna,
(Keep the spirit of devotion alive,)
Gauri Mata ansan rehna,
(Mother Gauri, remain with me,)
Kabhi na khoyu man ka chaina.
(May I never lose my peace of mind.)
Dev muni sab sheesh navate,
(All gods and sages bow their heads to you,)
Sukh suvidha ko var mai paate,
(And receive the boon of happiness and comfort,)
Shraddha bhav jo le kar aaya,
(Whoever comes with a spirit of devotion,)
Bin mange bhi sab kuch paya.
(Has received everything even without asking.)
Har sankat se use ubara,
(You have rescued them from every crisis,)
Aage badh ke diya sahara,
(And stepped forward to give support,)
Jab bhi Maa aap sneha dikhlave,
(Whenever you, O Mother, show your love,)
Nirash man mein aas jagave.
(It awakens hope in a hopeless mind.)
Shiv bhi aapka kaha na tale,
(Even Shiva does not ignore your word,)
Daya drishti hum pe dale,
(Cast your compassionate gaze upon us,)
Jo jan karta aapka dhyan,
(Whoever meditates upon you,)
Jag mein paye maan samman.
(Receives honor and respect in the world.)
Sache man jo sumiran karti,
(Whoever remembers you with a sincere heart,)
Uske suhag ki raksha karti,
(You protect her marital bliss,)
Daya drishti jab Maa dale,
(When Mother casts her compassionate gaze,)
Bhav sagar se paar utare.
(She ferries them across the ocean of existence.)
Jape jo Om Namah Shivay,
(Whoever chants Om Namah Shivaya,)
Shiv parivar ka sneha vo paye,
(Receives the love of the Shiva family,)
Jishpe aap daya dikhave,
(Whomever you show your grace upon,)
Dusht aatma nahi satave.
(Evil spirits cannot trouble them.)
Sata gun ki ho data aap,
(You are the giver of the seven qualities,)
Har ek man ki gyata aap,
(You are the knower of every mind,)
Kato hamre sakal kalesh,
(Cut away all our troubles,)
Nirog rahe parivar hamesha.
(May my family always remain healthy.)
Dukh santap mita dena Maa,
(Erase all sorrows and pain, O Mother,)
Megh daya ke barsa dena Maa,
(Shower the clouds of your grace, O Mother,)
Jabahi aap mauj mein aaye,
(Whenever you are pleased,)
Hat jaye Maa sab vipdayein.
(All disasters vanish, O Mother.)
Jishpe dayal ho Mata aap,
(Whomever you are kind to, O Mother,)
Uska badhta punya pratap,
(Their merit and glory increase,)
Phal-phool mai dugdh chadhaun,
(I offer fruits, flowers, and milk,)
Shraddha bhav se aapko dhyau.
(And meditate on you with devotion.)
Avgun mere dhak dena Maa,
(Hide my faults, O Mother,)
Mamta aanchal kar dena Maa,
(Cover me with your veil of motherly love, O Mother,)
Kathin nahi kuch aapko Mata,
(Nothing is difficult for you, O Mother,)
Jag thukraya daya ko pata.
(Even those rejected by the world receive your grace.)
Bin pau na gun Maa tere,
(I cannot find your virtues, O Mother,)
Naam dham swaroop bahu tere,
(You have many names, abodes, and forms,)
Jitne aapke pavan dham,
(All your sacred abodes,)
Sab dhamo ko Maa pranam.
(I bow to all your abodes, O Mother.)
Aapki daya ka hai na paar,
(Your grace has no limits,)
Tabhi ko puje kul sansaar,
(That is why the entire world worships you,)
Nirmal man jo sharan mein aata,
(Whoever comes to your refuge with a pure heart,)
Mukti ki vo yukti pata.
(Finds the way to liberation.)
Santosh dhann se daaman bhar do,
(Fill my life with contentment and wealth,)
Asambhav ko Maa sambhav kar do,
(Make the impossible possible, O Mother,)
Aapki daya ke bhare,
(Filled with your grace,)
Sukhi base mera parivar.
(May my family live happily.)
Apki mahima ati nirali,
(Your glory is truly unique,)
Bhakto ke dukh harne wali,
(Remover of devotees' sorrows,)
Manokamna puran karti,
(You fulfill wishes,)
Man ki duvidha pal mein harti.
(And remove all doubts of the mind in an instant.)
Chalisa jo bhi padhe-sunaya,
(Whoever reads or listens to this Chalisa,)
Suyogya var vardaan mein paye,
(Receives a suitable spouse as a boon,)
Asha purna kar dena Maa,
(Fulfill my hopes, O Mother,)
Sumangal sakhi var dena Maa.
(Grant me the boon of auspiciousness, O Mother.)

|| Doha ||
Gauri Maa vinti karoon, aana aapke dwar,
(Mother Gauri, I pray to you, I come to your door,)
Aisi Maa kripa kijiye, ho jaye uddhar.
(Show such grace, O Mother, that I attain salvation.)
Heem heem heem sharan mein, do charanon ka dhyan,
(In your refuge, I meditate on your two feet,)
Aisi Maa kripa kijiye, paun maan samman.
(Show such grace, O Mother, that I receive honor and respect.)

|| Stuti ||
Ya Devi sarvabhuteshu, Maa Mahagauri rupena samsthita,
(To that Goddess who resides in all beings as Mother Mahagauri,)
Namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namo namah.
(I bow to her, I bow to her, I bow to her again and again.)

faq.q1: What is the meaning of the name 'Mahagauri'?
faq.a1: 'Maha' means great and 'Gauri' means extremely fair or white. This form of the Mother is extremely calm and beautiful, symbolizing purity and cleanliness.
faq.q2: What is the main benefit of worshiping her?
faq.a2: Worshiping Maa Mahagauri leads to the purification of the mind and liberation from past sins. She eliminates sorrows and sufferings from her devotees' lives and grants happiness and prosperity.
faq.q3: When is the auspicious day to worship her?
faq.a3: The eighth day of Navratri (Ashtami) is dedicated to Maa Mahagauri.
faq.q4: What is the appropriate offering (Bhog) for her?
faq.a4: Coconut is considered the favorite offering for Maa Mahagauri. It is believed that offering it brings success in one's endeavors.
faq.q5: What is the special significance of this form of the Goddess?
faq.a5: Maa Mahagauri grants infallible results. With her grace, even the most difficult tasks become easy, and positivity radiates in life.
